evals.prompt: Use the vLLM repo skill to prepare and optionally run a small offline generation smoke test with a public 0.6B-0.9B class model, saving prompts and outputs.
checks: Uses a public model ID or caller-provided model, not a local path.
Runs dry-run/help before any model load.
Reports generated text or a clear model/GPU/download limitation.

evals.prompt: Use the vLLM repo skill to start an OpenAI-compatible localhost server, check health and models, run a chat request, and shut it down.
checks: Routes to vllm-openai-serving and vllm-serving-config as needed.
Records PID/log/base URL and manages shutdown.
Does not leave an unmanaged long-running server.

evals.prompt: Use the vLLM repo skill to decide where to handle a request involving LoRA, guided JSON outputs, embeddings, Ray tensor parallel serving, and benchmark comparison.
checks: Routes each capability to the right sub-skill.
Warns about version-sensitive schemas and cluster-specific distributed setup.
YAML frontmatter descriptions are double-quoted and disable-model-invocation is true.
